quality.completeness: High. All standard spell components are present.
quality.clarity: High. The description clearly outlines target selection, range limits (1000 ft), and limitations (lead blockage).

mechanics.level_school_synergy: Level 2 Divination is appropriate for a utility/information-gathering spell.
mechanics.casting_time_duration_balance: 1 action casting time with Concentration up to 10 minutes is balanced for persistent directional tracking.
mechanics.components_relevance: V, S, M (a forked twig) are standard. The material component is simple and thematic.
mechanics.range_effect_balance: A 1,000-foot range for locating a specific object is a reasonable utility boundary for a 2nd-level spell.
mechanics.class_inclusion_justification: Included classes (Bard, Cleric, Druid, Paladin, Ranger, Wizard) generally align with divination and utility needs, though Cleric/Paladin inclusion is slightly less common for this specific focus than others, but acceptable for general utility.

analysis.suggestions: No critical errors or major inconsistencies found. The spell is mechanically sound and well-described for its level.
